text.title: Freelancer Positioning Content Calendar Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Freelancer Positioning Content Calendar.

example.scenario: Solo data freelancer with three pillars (analytics-eng, dbt, fivetran-ops).
example.trace: pillars (3) → topics (44 harvested from 11 client projects) → calendar (52 weeks mapped) → cadence (1/week LinkedIn + 1/month newsletter) → next_review (90 days)
